author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
Every Time Miley’s Secret Almost Got Exposed! 😱🎤 | Hannah Montana Compilation | @disneychannel
Miley Stewart is living a double life as Hannah Montana…but keeping it a secret isn’t always easy! Watch all the times Miley’s biggest secret almost got revealed. 

Watch the next Hannah Montana video here: https://youtu.be/XhVJnIO4xC4

Available on Disney+
https://shows.disney.com/hannah-montana

Watch more Hannah Montana videos here: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6R6yXKSLYDY0yMFw36XjhK5mBZWlW9t&si=0L5gyjaGNkkCJeul

Miley Stewart (Miley Cyrus) is a teenager living a secret double life as an average schoolgirl by day and as the famous recording artist Hannah Montana by night!

author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
Maddie Fitzpatrick Meets Hannah Montana! 😍⭐️ | Hannah Montana Throwback | @disneychannel
Watch a clip from Hannah Montana Season 1 Episode 12, "On the Road Again". Miley believes that her dad gave up his own dream of singing so that she could pursue her career.
